---
title: "Figure 4D_Adventitial Fibroblast Heatmap"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)

# Path to integrated Seurat object
lungQuery <- readRDS("path_to_object/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```

```{r}
# Subset Adventitial fibroblasts
adv_obj <- subset(
  obj,
  subset = predicted.ann_finest_level == "Adventitial fibroblasts"
)

# Custom stage mapping
adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom <- NA
adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[adv_obj$Donor %in% c("s062")] <- "Early Saccular"
adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[adv_obj$Donor %in% c("s088", "s229", "s232")] <- "Saccular"
adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[adv_obj$Donor %in% c("threeDayM", "twelveDayF")] <- "Early Alveolar"
adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[adv_obj$Donor %in% c("twoYrOldM", "twoYrOldM2")] <- "Alveolar"
adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom[adv_obj$Donor_Group == "PT_BPD"] <- "PT_BPD"

stage_order <- c(
  "Early Saccular",
  "Saccular",
  "Early Alveolar",
  "Alveolar",
  "PT_BPD"
)

adv_obj <- subset(
  adv_obj,
  cells = rownames(adv_obj@meta.data)[adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom %in% stage_order]
)

adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom <- factor(
  adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom,
  levels = stage_order
)

table(adv_obj$Lung_Stage_Custom)

# Replace with the exact 6 genes used in panel H
genes_use <- c(
  "KLF4", "POU5F1", "MYC", "MYCBP2", "SOX2", "HDAC2"
)

expr_mat <- GetAssayData(
  adv_obj,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data"
)

genes_use <- genes_use[genes_use %in% rownames(expr_mat)]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[genes_use, ]
meta <- adv_obj@meta.data
meta <- meta[colnames(expr_sub), ]

avg_exp_raw <- sapply(stage_order, function(stage) {
  cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$Lung_Stage_Custom == stage]
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cells, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_exp_raw <- as.matrix(avg_exp_raw)
colnames(avg_exp_raw) <- stage_order

avg_exp_raw <- avg_exp_raw[rowSums(avg_exp_raw) > 0, ]
avg_exp_raw <- avg_exp_raw[apply(avg_exp_raw, 1, sd) > 0, ]

avg_exp_z <- t(scale(t(avg_exp_raw)))
avg_exp_z <- avg_exp_z[complete.cases(avg_exp_z), ]

avg_exp_z_clipped <- avg_exp_z
avg_exp_z_clipped[avg_exp_z_clipped > 1.5] <- 1.5
avg_exp_z_clipped[avg_exp_z_clipped < -1.5] <- -1.5

pheatmap(
  avg_exp_z_clipped,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  border_color = NA,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#440154", "#31688E", "#35B779", "#FDE725"))(100),
  breaks = seq(-1.5, 1.5, length.out = 101),
  legend_breaks = c(-1.5, 0, 1.5),
  legend_labels = c("-1.5", "0", "1.5"),
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 18,
  angle_col = 45,
  main = "Adventitial Fibroblast"
)

write.csv(avg_exp_raw, "Fig4H_AdventitialFibroblast_RawAverageExpression.csv")
write.csv(avg_exp_z, "Fig4H_AdventitialFibroblast_RowZscore.csv")
write.csv(avg_exp_z_clipped, "Fig4H_AdventitialFibroblast_RowZscore_Clipped_ForPlot.csv")
